title: RAN CPRI link flap — DFW cluster
description: Multiple overnight resets on Ericsson Baseband 6630; CPRI degradation on sectors 2–4; traffic held on secondary carrier.

title: 5G SA core attach failures
description: AMF registration timeouts spike during software activation window; Ericsson dual-SMF deployment; impact ~12k failed attaches.

title: Microwave hop LOS — ORD backhaul
description: Ericsson MINI-LINK 6352 near-line-of-sight fade during heavy rain; 2+0 protected path failed to switch clean; aggregation ring constrained.

title: vRAN vDU CPU peg — West overlay
description: Kubernetes worker node CPU sustained >95% on vDU workload; suspect Ericsson SW release interaction with host NIC driver; manual scale-out restored.

title: Ericsson OSS alarm storm
description: Passive NE synchronization job caused duplicate alarms and suppressed critical power alarms for 22 minutes; NOC manual correlation.
